### Today (Right Now)
```
1. Read: .github/README.md
2. Explore: .github/QUICK-START.md
3. Start: /research-deep-dive (for one school)

/research-deep-dive

  ├─ Simon Rochester
  ├─ Rutgers
  └─ CUNY Baruch
→ 4 research profiles created

  ├─ Draft SOP #1 (NYU)
  ├─ Get feedback
  └─ Iterate
→ First SOP complete

### By July 31
```
/sop-generator (all 4)
/resume-optimizer (all 4)
→ All documents for submission ready

## 💡 Key Features of Each SKILL

### SOP Generator
- ✅ Extract narrative threads from resume
- ✅ Draft 650-word SOP (school-specific)
- ✅ Get admissions committee feedback (/10 score)
- ✅ Strengthen weak paragraphs
- ✅ Compare versions (detect duplicates)
- ✅ Polish to exact word count

### Resume Optimizer
- ✅ Generate base resume (US 1-page format)
- ✅ Score ATS compatibility (6 dimensions)
- ✅ Identify top 5 priority fixes
- ✅ Create school-specific versions
- ✅ Track changes across all 4 schools
- ✅ Human readiness assessment

### Interview Prep Sprint
- ✅ 15 admissions interview Q&A
- ✅ 25 F-1 visa interview Q&A
- ✅ "Why Analytics?" answer (60 sec)
- ✅ "Why US?" answer (45–60 sec)
- ✅ Mock interview sessions with feedback
- ✅ Speaking notes + timing guides

### Admissions Tracker
- ✅ Real-time status updates (✅ 🟡 ⬜)
- ✅ 30-day deadline alerts
- ✅ Per-school checklists
- ✅ Blocker identification & resolution
- ✅ Progress summaries (email-ready)
- ✅ Critical path tracking

### Research Deep Dive
- ✅ Program fit analysis (/10 score)
- ✅ Alumni career path mapping
- ✅ Program comparison (vs peers)
- ✅ Job market intelligence
- ✅ Scholarship discovery
- ✅ SOP talking points extracted

---

## 🔄 Progressive Enhancement (4 Phases)

### Phase 1 (NOW) ✅ Complete
Core workflows, templates, examples, guides

### Phase 2 (Jul–Aug) Coming
- Automation: Calendar sync, email reminders, Slack alerts
- Intelligence: Keyword weighting, verb detection, video analysis
- New Features: Course database, tone analysis, interviewer profiles

### Phase 3 (September) Coming
- Advanced: ATS simulation, competitive benchmarking, career forecasting
- Analytics: Earnings data, alumni reviews, visa pathway modeling

### Phase 4 (Oct–Dec) Coming
- Mastery: A/B testing, stress scenarios, risk forecasting, decision scoring

## 🎯 Success Outcomes (Built-In Checklists)

By following these SKILLs, you'll have:

✅ **Research Phase:**
- [ ] 4 deep program profiles
- [ ] 20+ talking points (school-specific)
- [ ] Career outcomes mapped
- [ ] Funding options identified

✅ **Writing Phase:**
- [ ] 4 school-specific SOPs (650 words each)
- [ ] 4 ATS-optimized resumes (8.5+/10 score)
- [ ] All documents tailored
- [ ] Admissions feedback incorporated

✅ **Interview Phase:**
- [ ] 40 Q&A practiced
- [ ] 2 full mock interviews completed
- [ ] "Why Analytics?" perfected
- [ ] "Why US?" perfected

✅ **Submission Phase:**
- [ ] 4 apps submitted on time
- [ ] All documents confirmed uploaded
- [ ] Recommender letters submitted
- [ ] Test scores sent

✅ **Final Goals:**
- [ ] Admission offers received
- [ ] F-1 visa approved
- [ ] Ready to depart → Jan 2027

## 🚀 How to Invoke

**In VS Code Copilot Chat, type:**

```
/research-deep-dive           ← Start here!
/sop-generator               ← Write SOPs
/resume-optimizer            ← Create resumes
/interview-prep-sprint       ← Practice interviews
/admissions-tracker          ← Track deadlines
```

**Or ask Copilot directly:**
- "Help me research NYU" → `/research-deep-dive`
- "I need to write my SOP" → `/sop-generator`
- "Optimize my resume" → `/resume-optimizer`
- "Prepare me for interviews" → `/interview-prep-sprint`
- "What's my application status?" → `/admissions-tracker`

## 📚 Documentation Architecture

| Document | Purpose | Length | Audience |
|----------|---------|--------|----------|
| README.md | Main entry point | 1-2 min | Everyone |
| QUICK-START.md | Common workflows | 5 min | First-time users |
| SKILLS-ECOSYSTEM.md | How it all connects | 10 min | Strategic view |
| [SKILL].md | Main workflow | 15–20 min | SKILL users |
| templates/ | Start from templates | — | Project work |
| examples/ | See real examples | — | Reference |
| reference/ | Learn best practices | — | Deep dives |

---

## ✨ What Makes This Different

✅ **Progressive Enhancement** — Start simple, improve continuously  
✅ **Bundled Assets** — Templates included (don't start from scratch)  
✅ **Real Examples** — See completed work before starting  
✅ **Clear Workflows** — 5–7 specific steps per SKILL  
✅ **Built-In Quality Checks** — Scoring rubrics included  
✅ **Roadmap Visible** — See what's coming (Phase 2–4)  
✅ **Auto-Discovery** — VS Code finds all SKILLs automatically
